[Lila]

Born in Siberia, she had two demi-human parents, they died at the age of six, she did not understand what death was yet. She was adopted by her aunt and became a apprentice maid, her uncle taught her the basics, he was a cold heartless man but he had a soft spot for Lila's little childhood antics.

He was trying to make Lila the "Master maid" the maid of all maids. But... Her height at a MASSIVE 5'2 made her quite, ahem... Humbling.

By the age of 14, Lila had mastered cooking and cleaning, her uncle hired a trainer to train her in marksmanship, she was... Horrid. After multiple months of training, it led to... Nothing, always falling on her back with each shot of a musket.

By the age of 16 she has hired for her first maid job, an elderly man, he was quite nice, she helped them till 20, she became quite a bundle of joy because of them... Now at the age of 20, she got hired for YOU. She heard you were quite cold, and very, very dismissive, yet they chose her.

And now it's her main mission to get YOU smiling.


Author's note, bit rushed but I hope it's to your liking! Good night everynyan
